form.formComment: Returns from a 12 weeks break and only other fresh up run was on debut, when a 22.60 winner over 400m at Maitland. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a 12 weeks break and only other fresh up run was on debut, when a 22.60 winner over 400m at Maitland. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and came together entering the front straight.
Shifted wide, made contact rounding the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Returns from a spell and worth noting was a winner when last resuming, scoring over 520m at Q Parklands. Looks well placed here and expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a spell and worth noting was a winner when last resuming, scoring over 520m at Q Parklands. Looks well placed here and expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head to the outside away from the lure approaching the finish.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (31.00) over 527m at this track. Has a low draw. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (31.00) over 527m at this track. Has a low draw. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was hampered and carried wider rounding the turn into the back straight.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 15 over 340m at this track in a Grade 5. Others hold stronger claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 15 over 340m at this track in a Grade 5. Others hold stronger claims.

form.formComment: In the placings last start over 431m at this track before a break of three months. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the placings last start over 431m at this track before a break of three months. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Jumps from box 6 for the first time after placing latest at Dubbo (18.90) in a Grade 5. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Jumps from box 6 for the first time after placing latest at Dubbo (18.90) in a Grade 5. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Showing promise but missed the frame last start when sixth at Temora. Form solid prior to that including a win at Dubbo three back. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showing promise but missed the frame last start when sixth at Temora. Form solid prior to that including a win at Dubbo three back. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 5 lengths at this track over 431m (25.19) beating Blocker's Mate in Maiden on April 15. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 5 lengths at this track over 431m (25.19) beating Blocker's Mate in Maiden on April 15. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn, heels checked off and became unbalanced momentarily.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 4.5 lengths behind My Irish over 431m. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 4.5 lengths behind My Irish over 431m. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won comfortably by 9 lengths at this track (25.10) beating Orana Willow in a Maiden on April 4. Look for improvement. Not out of it.
